user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. evidence_standard_met_reason: Evidence standard met. Requirement: The claimed object and relevant part should be visible clearly enough to inspect the claimed condition.
claim_status_justification: The claim is supported as img_1 clearly shows a medium-severity dent on the rear bumper of the car, meeting the evidence standard for inspection. No contradictions were found between the reported damage and the image evidence. The claimant's low-risk history with prior accepted claims further corroborates the legitimacy of this submission.
